svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "New Reel"

text.tspan: G/F C/G C D/G | G F G D/G
G/F C/G C D/G | G F D D/G
Notes: A somewhat mysterious tune I found amongst the practice / lesson tapes from Dale
Morris that my teacher passed on to me. I only have it down as "New Reel" (was it
Dale's composition?), but it might be a traditional tune.
